markets.no_sub_title: Max Verstappen
markets.rules_primary: If Max Verstappen set the fastest valid qualifying lap time in the qualifying session that determines the starting grid for the Chinese Grand Prix originally scheduled for March 14, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: For the purposes of this market, Pole Position is awarded to the driver who records the fastest official lap time in the Qualifying session (Q3) of the Grand Prix, as determined by the FIA’s published classification. If Qualifying does not progress to Q3 (e.g., weather, red flags, or format changes), Pole Position will be awarded based on the FIA’s official qualifying results for that event. Pole Position for this market is determined exclusively by the official qualifying classification and is not impacted by the final starting grid; any subsequent grid penalties or starting-order adjustments do not change who is deemed to have achieved Pole Position. Sprint Race qualifying sessions are not considered for this market.

markets.no_sub_title: Threat
markets.rules_primary: If any participating contestant says Threat as part of Survivor Season 50 Episode 3, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the Survivor Season 50 Episode 3 will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the Survivor Season 50 Episode 3 will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. 
Plural nouns occurring within proper nouns and noun phrases (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included.
For the purpose of this market, the live broadcast or stream will be used to resolve this event. 
Additional content not included in the original broadcast or stream will not count. 
Promotional content aired during the event will count, but advertisements will not. 
For the purpose of this market, the entirety of content within the original broadcast will be used for resolution; previously aired content (including episode recaps) & future episode sneak peeks that are broadcast during the live event will count towards this market.
Please see full rules for more details.

Postponement:
If the event is postponed, and such a postponement is announced by the end of the following calendar day to be rescheduled to a time within 14 calendar days, the markets shall remain open.
